title: Feature Root: Fix intermittent test suite hang at end of pytest run
description: Shared execution root for the test-hang remediation feature. Coordinate small implementation beads for timeout configuration, git subprocess hardening, and test fixture isolation before shared validation, documentation, and review.
acceptance_criteria: All implementation beads required for the hang fix are completed before follow-up validation begins.
Shared follow-up beads cover the full implementation set rather than duplicating per-bead validation.
The final feature tree leaves the repository ready for a clean retry of the previously stranded merge flow.
